studentProgress.title: My Learning Progress
studentProgress.subtitle: Overview of your time spent in lessons and performance in exams.

studentProgress.startLessonToSeeTime: Start any lesson to see where you spend your time.
studentProgress.examPerformanceDescription: Best scores for your recent exams.
studentProgress.noExamChartYet: Once you complete exams with scores, a chart of your performance will appear here.
studentProgress.noLessonsStarted: You haven't started any lessons yet. Your progress will appear here once you begin learning.

studentChat.subtitle: AI tutor sessions from your classes.

studentChat.startNewSession: Start a new session to begin.
studentChat.chooseSessionStudent: Choose a tutor session from the list to start.
studentChat.askQuestionToStart: Ask a question below to start.

studentLessons.subtitle: Access lessons from your enrolled classes.

studentLessons.noLessonsHint: Lessons from your enrolled classes will appear here once they are shared by your teachers.
studentLessons.chooseBestAnswers: Choose the best answers. When you are ready, click
studentLessons.noExamples: No examples available for this lesson
studentLessons.noTestQuestions: No test questions available for this lesson

studentSettings.title: Account settings
studentSettings.subtitle: Basic information for your student account.
studentSettings.accountInfoDescription: This page shows basic information about your Eduator student account. Account details are managed by your school administrator.
studentSettings.contactAdminDescription: To update your name, email, or photo, please contact your school or platform administrator.
studentSettings.signOutDescription: End your current session on this device.

studentExams.title: Available Exams
studentExams.subtitle: View and take exams from your enrolled classes.
studentExams.searchPlaceholder: Search exams by title, class, teacher, or description...
studentExams.noExamsHint: Exams from your enrolled classes will appear here once they are published by your teachers.

studentExamTake.youCanRetake: You can take it again to improve your score.
studentExamTake.selectPreferredLanguage: Select your preferred language for this exam
studentExamTake.sessionExpiredMessage: Your session expired (e.g. exam open too long). Sign in again to submit your answers.
studentExamTake.examPassingMessage: Passing this exam (70% or higher) indicates successful completion of the course.

studentExamResults.teacherWillShareResults: Your teacher will share the results when they are ready. You can check back later or they will notify you.
studentExamResults.reviewCorrectSolutions: Review your answers and see the correct solutions
studentExamResults.correctOnlyShown: Correct answers and explanations are shown only for questions you answered correctly.
studentExamResults.reviewNoCorrectShown: Review your answers. Correct answers and explanations are not shown for this exam.
studentExamResults.question: Question
studentExamResults.examPassingMessage: Passing this exam (70% or higher) indicates successful completion of the course.

studentClasses.subtitle: View your enrolled classes, access materials, and track your progress.
studentClasses.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search terms to find classes.
studentClasses.emptyHintJoin: Join a class using a class code provided by your teacher, or wait to be enrolled by your school administrator.
studentClasses.emptyHintAdmin: Your School Administrator will enroll you in classes. Once enrolled, they will appear here.
studentClasses.searchPlaceholder: Search classes by name, code, or teacher...
studentClasses.joinSuccessPending: Request sent. You will have access once the teacher approves.
studentClasses.quickTipText: Click on any class to view exams, access materials, and track your progress. You can also join new classes using a class code from your teacher.
studentClasses.errorJoining: An error occurred while joining the class

studentClassDetail.teachersWillAppear: Teachers will appear here once assigned to the class.
studentClassDetail.studentsWillAppear: Students will appear here once they join the class.
studentClassDetail.noContentHint: Your teacher hasn't shared any exams, documents, or lessons with this class yet. Check back soon!

studentCalendar.title: Calendar
studentCalendar.subtitle: Upcoming and past scheduled lessons and exams. Items here are only available during their scheduled time.
studentCalendar.libraryVsCalendarBody: Exams and Lessons show what your teacher shared with your class — you can open and use them anytime. Here in Calendar you see only scheduled items; these are available only during their date and time window.
studentCalendar.noUpcomingHintPrefix: Your teacher may add lessons or exams to the calendar. You can still use everything shared in

studentAssistant.heroSubtitle: Exams, lessons, today's activity, and answers — all in one place.
studentAssistant.nudgeNoActivity: You didn't work on a lesson or exam today. Consider doing one to stay on track.
studentAssistant.youHaveUpcoming: You have {exams} upcoming exam(s) and {lessons} lesson(s) available. A short session can keep you on track.
studentAssistant.checkBackLater: Check back later or ask your teacher.
studentAssistant.lessonsDescription: Pick up where you left off
studentAssistant.studyPulseDescription: Combined readiness from lessons and exams
studentAssistant.takeOneToSeeScore: Take one to see your score
studentAssistant.completeForBadge: Complete a lesson or exam to earn your first badge.
studentAssistant.iHaveYourSchedule: I have your schedule. Ask about today, exams, or your progress.
studentAssistant.promptFocusToday: What should I focus on today?
studentAssistant.promptDidLessonOrExam: Did I do a lesson or exam today?
studentAssistant.useTabsAbove: Use the tabs above to see your exams, lessons, and updates.
